title: acrostichum polyphyllum
intro: Acrostichum polyphyllum, also known as the mangrove fern, is a species of fern that is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in mangrove forests. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acrostichum polyphyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
